gate_override.reason: Awaiting user decision. 0 CRITICAL findings; every NEW WARN is documentation catch-up — plan.md / spec.md / product-spec / tasks.md not amended for the very large Sessions 18-22 shipped surface (§11 closeout + entire §13 14-task cluster + dispatcher contract change + migration runner + reviews sub-route). Material gaps: (1) spec.md says 14 active notification types; code has 16, (2) PushSubscription entity missing from spec + plan, (3) plan §8 dispatcher prose hasn't caught up to the shipped contract (in_app-first row creation, notification_id threading, FailedEmail retry, asyncio.to_thread wrap, 410-Gone subscription cleanup, TYPES registry, security email lock, quiet-hours TZ math, 4-bucket Redis scheme), (4) tasks.md §13 cluster + T030 + T094 (16 tasks) lost their structural fields entirely, (5) T118/T119 Paths stale post route-rename. Carry-forwards (L3-017, L4-009, L6-002) remain user-deferred under existing dispositions. Code is healthy: 867 backend pass / 3 skip across 179 source files; 63 frontend Vitest pass; Biome 131 files + tsc 0 errors + next build 16+2 routes; zero orphan files.

honest_assessment: Sessions 18-22 shipped a remarkable amount of code (~200 backend tests + ~50 frontend tests + 6 new endpoints + 3 adapters + 1 worker + 6 frontend components + 2 new pages + migration runner + reviews sub-route). The code is healthy across every quality gate. The drift is downstream and structural-documentary: 30+ enumeration entries missing across plan §3.1/§6/§4.5/§15.2/§8/§7; spec.md notification count off by 2; tasks.md §13 cluster lost its convention. The single biggest task-doc problem is L4-026 (16 tasks lost their structural fields) — that's a heavy single fix but it unblocks all future Layer 5 forward-sweeps for the §13 cluster. The L2-028 count drift (14 vs 16) is a 2-line edit. The L3-036 plan §8 doc-catchup is the heaviest plan edit but resolves the conceptual core of the §13 design surface. Nothing here is a bug; it's all 'what we shipped vs what we promised in our docs' alignment.
next_action: User reviews Run #11 findings + chooses disposition. Recommended: apply 17 inline edits in a single coordinated pass mirroring Run #10. After that — continue Phase 6 implementation toward §14 Profile/Settings (T145-T152) or §15 Observability (T153-T161). Re-run sync-verify after the next cluster lands.
